entry.title: Neuherbs Men’s Muscle Health Pack for Strength & Recovery
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Fish Oil 200 + Magnesium Tablet
Price: 1999.00

This powerful Fish Oil & Magnesium combo is designed to support total body wellness from the inside out for those who are fitness enthusiasts an want more from their daily workout routines. The triple-strength Fish Oil supplement delivers 2500 mg of fish oil with an impressive 1486 mg of Omega-3 fatty acids, enriched with Vitamin D3 and Vitamin E for enhanced benefits and antioxidant protection. This fish oil omega-3 supplement is a lemon flavoured fish oil which does not cause fishy burps. neuherbs Deep-Sea Fish Oil is clinically proven to help reduce inflammation, lower cholesterol and triglyceride levels, and increase good (HDL) cholesterol for better heart & muscle health. Paired with this is a high-strength Magnesium Bisglycinate supplement providing 1600 mg of highly bioavailable magnesium, the form best absorbed by the body. Magnesium plays a vital role in supporting healthy muscles, promoting deeper and more restful sleep, boosting energy levels, and enhancing brain and nervous system function. Together, this carefully formulated combo works synergistically to improve heart health, muscle recovery, mental clarity, and overall daily vitality, making it an ideal choice for anyone seeking complete nutritional support.

entry.title: Neuherbs Hair Biotin Capsules - DHT Blocker Hair Supplement
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Hair Biotin Capsules
Price: 499.00 - 949.00 (2 variants)

neuherbs Hair Biotin Capsule Supplement for Men and Women is specially formulated to support healthier, stronger hair from within. This hair biotin supplement delivers 100% RDA of biotin—naturally derived from Sesbania—to boost keratin production, strengthen weak strands, and promote visible hair growth, making it one of the best biotin supplements for daily use.
To ensure maximum nutrient absorption, it contains probiotic with 10 billion CFU that enhance gut health, helping your body absorb essential nutrients more effectively for improved hair and scalp nourishment. The formula also includes five natural DHT blockers, such as pumpkin seed and green tea extracts, known to reduce follicle shrinking and manage hair thinning from the roots—ideal for those seeking DHT blocker capsules for hair fall control.
Its dual-action blend combines the growth-promoting power of biotin with hair fall reducing benefits of DHT blockers. Added lycopene, a powerful antioxidant, protects hair cells from oxidative stress, keeping your scalp healthy —making it one of the best biotin for hair growth.

entry.title: Gold Deep-Sea Fish Oil With Higher Strength Omega-3
entry.s:type: Gold Deep Sea Fish Oil - 60 capsules
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Gold Deep Sea Fish Oil - 60 capsules
Price: 999.00 - 1899.00 (2 variants)

Lead a healthy, happy, and stress-free life knowing that you are continuously shielding your heart, brain, eye, and immunity with our uniquely formulated Omega-3 Gold Capsule.

neuherbs Gold Deep-Sea Fish Oil Omega-3 Capsules is a premium supplement in India designed to improve your health with the power of omega-3 fatty acids. It contains concentrated and highly potent Omega-3 fatty acids, Boswellia extract, curcuminoids, and Vitamins D3 and E. Each daily serving (2 capsules) delivers an impressive 1800mg of omega-3, including 1080mg of EPA and 720mg of DHA.

6X Omega-3

Muscle Recovery & Performance

Joint Support

Enhanced Absorption

Molecullarly Distilled

Trusted by 3 million

Why Should You Choose neuherbs’ Omega 3 Gold Fish Oil Capsule?

The Omega-3 fish oil gold is procured from the best quality deep-sea fish, anchovies, and sardines. We use an advanced molecular distillation process that separates, purifies, and concentrates the fish oil at low temperature to remove any heavy metal toxicity, organic contaminants, and other health-damaging ingredients. This advanced molecular distillation removes mercury, copper, and cadmium without losing the oil’s potency and nutrient efficiency.

The EPA and DHA found in Omega 3 Fatty Acids help boost good cholesterol levels and lower bad cholesterol, promoting overall heart health. They can also help reduce triglycerides, improving liver function and toxin removal process. Fatty acid DHA is known for its ability to enhance cognitive health and memory and navigate age-related brain issues like Alzheimer’s and dementia. Additionally, its anti-inflammatory properties help reduce muscle inflammation caused by injury, improve flexibility, and maintain joint health.

The all-new, unique, lemon-flavoured formula from neuherbs also offers the goodness of Vitamin E and Vitamin D3. They together help manage bone health as you age and protect your skin and hair from oxidative stress.

Omega Gold Capsule Benefits


  • Supports Cardiovascular Health: Regular intake promotes healthy cholesterol levels and blood pressure, contributing to overall heart wellness.
  • Improves Joint Flexibility: Infused with Boswellia extract. This supplement aids in reducing inflammation and alleviating joint stiffness, perfect for athletes, sportspersons, and bodybuilders.
  • Boosts Brain Function: Rich in DHA, these capsules support cognitive health, enhancing memory and focus.
  • Strengthens Immune System: The antioxidant properties of omega-3s help combat oxidative stress, promoting a strong immune response to various illnesses.
  • Improves Muscle Recovery: Ideal for post-workout recovery, our omega 3 gold fish oil tablets and capsules with added Vitamin D3 assist in muscle strength and performance optimisation.
  • Natural Lemon Essence: The natural flavour of lemon minimises fishy burps and unpleasant aftertaste commonly associated with other brands’ Omega 3 gold tablets.


Omega 3 Gold capsule benefits don’t end here. The presence of curcuminoids further makes the formula more bioavailable and result-driven.

Quality Trusted by Over 3 Million Consumers in India

At neuherbs, we prioritise quality above all. Our Omega 3 gold fish oils undergo rigorous third-party testing to ensure it is free from heavy metals and contaminants. Furthermore, each batch is evaluated based on ten quality control checks so that you get the best of both worlds – traditional Ayurveda and western science. We adhere to sustainable harvesting practices, ensuring that our fish oil is not only effective but also environmentally friendly.

Dosage and Packaging

neuherbs' omega 3 gold capsules are available in convenient packs of 60 softgels. Simply take one capsule twice daily with meals for optimal results. As a leader in health and wellness supplements in India, neuherbs is committed to providing natural solutions to improve your well-being without side effects or dependency.

Skin Glow Collagen supplement can further help in boosting collagen with the help of hyaluronic acid, vitamin C, E & Biotin with no artificial preservatives & colours. entry.title: Flaxseed Oil Capsules 1000mg With 821mg Omega 3-6-9, Additional Vitamin D3 & E To Support Heart, Joint & Skin For Women & Men
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Flaxeeds oil Capsules
Price: 499.00 - 998.00 (2 variants)

Are you a vegetarian? Wondering how to incorporate Omege-3s into your daily diet? neuherbs has made it easy for you. Introducing neuherbs’ Flaxseed Oil Capsules 1000mg - your plant-based Omega-3-6-9 powerhouse.  The supplement is a natural and potent source of Omega-3 fatty acids derived from flaxseeds. While fish oil is a popular choice, flaxseed oil provides a vegetarian and vegan-friendly option, rich in alpha-linolenic acid (ALA), a precursor to EPA and DHA.

neuherbs flaxseed oil capsules deliver a 500mg concentrated dose of ALA, supporting overall health and well-being. It also contains 134 mg of Omega-6 (Linoleic acid) and 187mg of Omega-9 (Oleic acid).

In addition, the Omega-3 flaxseed oil supplements are fortified with Vitamin D and Vitamin E to enhance bone and skin health.

 

Flaxseed Oil Capsules 1000mg Benefits

 

As one of the best flaxseed oil capsules in India, neuherbs scientifically-researched product offers a range of health benefits:

  • Supports Heart Health: Flaxseed Omega-3 fatty acids contribute to cardiovascular wellness by helping maintain healthy cholesterol levels and blood pressure.
  • Promotes Brain Function: ALA is converted into EPA and DHA, which are crucial for cognitive function, memory, and focus.
  • Reduces Inflammation: Omega-3s possess anti-inflammatory properties that may help alleviate joint pain, muscle soreness, and other inflammatory conditions.
  • Protects Bone Health: neuherbs flaxseed oil capsules contain plant-based Vitamin D3, which supports bone health and improves signs of deficiency, such as back pain and buckling joints.
  • Supports Healthy Skin and Hair: ALA contributes to skin hydration and elasticity, promoting a healthy complexion and lustrous hair. The addition of Vitamin E, which is a potent antioxidant, further intensifies the results.
  • Flaxseed oil benefits for females: Omega-3 fatty acids, DHA in particular, help in foetal brain development, improving cognitive power and eye health in the womb. Vegetarian moms can also consume neuherbs Omega 3 flaxseed oil tablets to reduce the risks of preterm delivery.

 

neuherbs Quality Assurance

 

neuherbs is committed to delivering the highest quality omega-3 flaxseed oil capsules in India. Our flaxseeds are carefully selected from top organic farmers and cold-pressed to preserve their natural goodness. Each batch undergoes ten-step rigorous testing for purity, potency, and freshness.

Furthermore, the capsules do not contain additives, artificial colours, trans fats, or preservatives.

 

Recommended Dosage and Packaging

 

neuherbs omega 3 flaxseed oil tablets are available in packs of 60 capsules. For best results, take one softgel twice daily with a meal for at least three months. Since it is a natural product, it is recommended to store it in a cool, dry, and dark place to avoid rancidification.

To know more about your heart health and the benefits of Omgea-3 flaxseed oils, consult an expert for free.  Add neuherbs Flaxseed Oil Capsules 1000mg to your everyday meals and experience the numerous benefits of plant-based omega-3s.

entry.title: Mini Deep Sea Fish Oil 1000 mg (Lemon Flavour)
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Mini Fish Oil
Price: 399.00 - 999.00 (3 variants)

Are you looking for fish oil small capsules that are easy to swallow? neuherbs’ Mini Deep Sea Fish Oil Capsules solves your problem. Introducing the most potent source of Omega-3 fatty acids in a remarkably compact form. While regular fish oil capsules can be large and difficult to swallow, these omega 3 mini capsules offer a convenient and effective alternative.

These small size omega 3 capsules are 50% smaller than regular fish oil capsules, yet they deliver double the strength, providing 360mg of EPA and 240mg of DHA per softgel. Each mini fish oil pill also contains Vitamin E (100% RDA) and Vitamin D3 (100% RDA) to improve bone and skin health.

In addition, forget about the unpleasant fishy taste – these mini fish oil capsules are infused with a refreshing lemon flavour to eliminate fishy aftertaste and burps.


Mini Deep Sea Fish Oil Capsules Benefits


As the only brand offering smallest fish oil capsules in India in natural lemon flavour, neuherbs scientifically researched product delivers a range of health benefits:

  • Improves Heart Health: Omega-3 fatty acids, especially EPA, help maintain healthy cholesterol levels and blood pressure.
  • Enhances Brain Function: DHA are crucial for cognitive function, memory, and focus.
  • Reduces Inflammation: Omega-3s possess anti-inflammatory properties that may help alleviate joint pain and muscle soreness.
  • Vitamins D and E: Vitamin E improves absorption of Omega-3s, while Vitamin D ensures healthy bones and cartilage.


neuherbs Quality Assurance


neuherbs is committed to delivering the highest quality omega 3 fish oil mini softgels in India. We test the fish for heavy metal toxicity, including mercury, cobalt, copper, and cadmium, through a process called molecular distillation that offers 100% accurate results. In addition, each batch undergoes rigorous ten-step testing for purity, potency, and freshness.


Recommended Dosage and Packaging


neuherbs omega 3 fish oil mini softgels are available in packs of 120 capsules. For best results, take one small fish oil pill twice daily with a meal.

Consult an expert for free to learn more about your heart health and the benefits of Omega-3 fish oils. Add neuherbs’ Mini Deep Sea Fish Oil Capsules to your everyday routine and experience the numerous benefits of concentrated Omega-3s.

entry.title: High Strength Milk Thistle Capsules For Liver Health
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Milk Thistle
Price: 699.00 - 1299.00 (2 variants)

Regular alcohol consumption, smoking, antibiotics, painkillers, and junk food can often harm the liver by accumulating toxins. Milk Thistle is a flowering herb belonging to the daisy family. In traditional Ayurvedic practices, milk thistle can be used for problems related to the liver, owing to an active ingredient called Silymarin, which is an essential antioxidant that may have protective effects on the liver. neuherbs Milk Thistle capsules contain 800 mg of Silymarin and can help maintain liver health, reduce body inflammation, and improve overall health naturally.

entry.title: Neuherbs Hair Vitamins Tablets
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Hair Skin Vitamins
Price: 699.00 - 1328.00 (2 variants)

Daily exposure to pollution, stress, and an unhealthy diet can weaken hair from the roots, leading to dull, dry, thin hair with easy breakage. The good news? These are modifiable factors—and with the right nutrition, you can restore your hair strength and vitality. neuherbs Hair Vitamins Tablets for Hair Nourishment offer a complete solution for stronger, healthier, and more voluminous hair. This one-a-day hair vitamin formula combines 3 Clinically-Backed Blends including daily nourishment blend combining 15 essential vitamins and minerals—Biotin, natural Vitamin C, Zinc, and Iron—to bridge nutritional gaps, reduce oxidative stress, and repair hair follicles from within. Powered by the amino acids—featuring L-Lysine, L-Cysteine, L-Methionine (crucial for hair structure) and time-tested herbs like Amla, Rosemary, and Hibiscus extracts—they support keratin synthesis to strengthen hair strands, reduce hair greying, and promote thicker hair. Unlike typical hair supplements that focus only on hair fall, these biotin tablets provide comprehensive nourishment, repair, and strength, delivering 100% RDA of Biotin for visible volume and shine. To ensure maximum efficacy, neuherbs hair vitamin tablets include piperine from black pepper, which enhances nutrient absorption and bioavailability. Whether you're dealing with hair thinning, breakage, or simply wanting to boost your hair health, these tablets support your journey to healthier hair from the inside out.

entry.title: Deep Sea Fish Oil Capsules - 2500 mg Omega 3 (Lemon Flavored)
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Fish Oil
Price: 699.00 - 1799.00 (3 variants)

Neuherbs Deep Sea Fish Oil – Omega-3 Capsules for Daily Wellness

Looking for the best fish oil capsules in India? neuherbs deep sea fish oil offers a triple-strength formula designed to support your overall health. These omega-3 fish oil capsules are lemon-flavoured to eliminate fishy burps, making them the perfect fish oil supplement for men and women alike.

Why Choose Neuherbs Fish Oil Capsules?

Neuherbs brings you premium-quality fish oil capsules sourced from small deep-sea fish like sardines and anchovies. Rich in EPA and DHA, these omega-3 fish oil capsules deliver 2500 mg of pure fish oil per serving and are added with Vitamins E and D3.

  • Heart Health: Promotes healthy cholesterol level and supports cardiac function.
  • Brain Function: Improves memory, focus, & helps manage stress.
  • Skin & Hair: Among the best fish oil capsules for hair growth and glowing skin.
  • Weight Management: Ideal fish oil capsules for weight loss and metabolism support.
  • Joint & Bone Strength: Helps reduce inflammation and aids in muscle recovery.


Product Features

  • Triple-Strength Omega-3 Fish Oil Capsuless (2500 mg per serving, 2 capsules)
  • 1486 mg of Omega-3s: 892 mg EPA + 594 mg DHA
  • Lemon-flavoured softgels – no fishy burps and aftertaste
  • Fortified with Vitamin D3 and E
  • Available size includes fish oil 60 capsules and fish oil 200 capsules
  • Suitable for all: fish oil capsules for women improve hormone health and promote healthy pregnancy and fish oil capsules for men aid in post-workout muscle recovery, and brain and vision health.


Best-Rated Fish Oil Supplements with Quality You Can Trust

Our original fish oil capsules undergo 10 quality checks, including molecular distillation and third-party testing to remove heavy metals like mercury, lead, and arsenic. Whether you're buying your first pack or switching to a cleaner brand, this is the best omega-3 fish oil capsule, acclaimed for purity, potency, and effectiveness.

Affordable Fish Oil Capsules Price in India

With neuherbs, you don’t just get the best omega-3 capsules, you get premium quality at a great value. Whether you are comparing fish oil capsules price or omega-3 capsules price, our range delivers unmatched benefits for the price.

Who Should Use This?

  • Anyone looking for omega-3 fish oil capsules for daily heart and brain health
  • People seeking fish oil capsules for skin ageing or fish oil capsules for hair growth
  • Fitness enthusiasts using fish oil capsules for weight loss and recovery
  • Men and women looking to fill their omega-3 nutritional gap naturally
